abilities.title: Task / thread 编排与 durable run
abilities.state_mutation: 写 task event、写 runtime workspace、写 structured/full cache、写 artifact
abilities.quality_owner: 运行时完整性、恢复能力、任务生命周期一致性

abilities.title: 任务标准化、证据召回与 claim 校验
abilities.llm_tool_usage: 使用 payload builders、deterministic transforms、tool-backed retrieval
abilities.state_mutation: 写 workspace state files；最终经 orchestrator 汇总后进入 structured/report IR
abilities.quality_owner: 证据覆盖度、claim 可核验性、trace 完整性

abilities.title: 从 structured payload 组装 ReportIR 与 artifact manifest
abilities.state_mutation: 写 report_ir.json、回写 structured cache metadata、回填 task digest/manifest
abilities.quality_owner: system of record 稳定性、字段映射正确性、语义对象可追溯性

abilities.title: 构建 AgendaFrameMap 以表达议题、属性与框架关系
abilities.llm_tool_usage: 前半段以 workflow/pass 做 issue/attribute 候选、共现图与时间窗切片，frame articulation 可外包给窄 specialist
abilities.state_mutation: 写 agenda_frame_map artifact，进入 ReportIR 与 artifact manifest，并反向服务 risk/recommendation/compiler
abilities.quality_owner: 议题定义、责任归因与建议正当化的对象完整性

abilities.title: 构建 argument-aware 的 stance-target-conflict graph
abilities.llm_tool_usage: proposition extraction / target binding / relation recognition 以 typed extraction 为主，resolution synthesis 可由窄 specialist 补强
abilities.state_mutation: 写 conflict_map artifact，进入 ReportIR 与 artifact manifest
abilities.quality_owner: 冲突图对象完整性、target-aware 争论结构、收敛边界

abilities.title: 构建 event-causality-assisted 的传播机制图
abilities.llm_tool_usage: 时间切片、桥接检测、迁移识别优先做 workflow/pass，因果候选综合与阶段解释由 propagation specialist 补强
abilities.state_mutation: 写 mechanism_summary artifact，进入 ReportIR 与 artifact manifest
abilities.quality_owner: 传播机制的可解释性、因果候选质量、时间锚点与证据追溯性

abilities.title: 裁决判断对象是否具备进入正式文稿的决策可用性
abilities.llm_tool_usage: 当前为 typed judge/policy gate，不直接生成 prose；后续以 trace grading 驱动回退优化
abilities.state_mutation: 写 utility_assessment artifact，并驱动 fallback_recompile / semantic review
abilities.quality_owner: 决策结构完整性、回退可解释性、审批门禁稳定性

abilities.title: 从 ReportIR 编译正式 Markdown
abilities.llm_tool_usage: 当前主实现为 deterministic compiler passes；兼容 render path 仍保留
failure_modes: 风险条目缺 claim/evidence 引用
abilities.quality_owner: 文稿不引入新事实、编译结果可回链到 ReportIR

abilities.title: 场景选择、布局预算、section writer、critic/revise 图
abilities.llm_tool_usage: 大量 LLM + tool + graph nodes，混合 style/fact critic 与 rewrite
abilities.state_mutation: 对外主要写 full payload；内部也会构造 graph state 与 trace
abilities.quality_owner: 正式文稿质量、版式组织、事实边界控制

abilities.title: 主体范围、风险动作映射、claim matrix 等高阶语义整理
abilities.llm_tool_usage: 混合 deterministic logic 与 LLM analyst nodes
abilities.state_mutation: 主要驻留在 full report graph state，部分进入 final markdown
abilities.quality_owner: 语义一致性、claim gate 完整性

abilities.title: 旧版结构化报告生成
abilities.llm_tool_usage: 旧版报告 prompt 与 helper 组合
abilities.state_mutation: 直接写 cache，并被旧路径消费
abilities.quality_owner: 兼容层稳定性，不再承担主事实生成责任

abilities.title: 旧版报告文本拼装与文档导出
abilities.llm_tool_usage: 部分 LLM 调用，主体是 deterministic 文档拼装
abilities.state_mutation: 写离线文稿文件，不与 task state 统一
failure_modes: 文稿与当前语义链脱节

abilities.title: analyze / explain 结果兜底准备与 smart-fill
abilities.llm_tool_usage: 必要时用 LLM 生成 explain fallback 文本
abilities.state_mutation: 写 explain outputs，影响 worker 前置条件
failure_modes: fallback explain 与 task/thread 无直接 lineage
legacy progress 依赖日志目录

abilities.title: HTTP 路由与任务/结果投影
abilities.llm_tool_usage: 不直接调用 LLM；聚合 deep_report/runtime/task_queue 结果
abilities.state_mutation: 创建任务、取消/重试任务、审批、读取兼容进度
failure_modes: legacy progress 与 task progress 双轨
cache 与 task snapshot 不一致
abilities.quality_owner: 外部接口契约、任务视图一致性

abilities.title: 队列任务执行桥接
abilities.llm_tool_usage: 不直接做推理；调度 runtime 与 full report generation
abilities.state_mutation: 持续修改 task state、append events、标记 artifacts ready
abilities.quality_owner: 队列执行稳定性、task snapshot 完整性

abilities.title: 运行台、语义报告、正式文稿三视图投影
abilities.state_mutation: 维护前端 store、本地恢复、stream/polling 状态
failure_modes: 旧布尔门与 manifest 混用
abilities.quality_owner: 产品状态一致性、视图术语统一
